repository_metadata.name: Qwen-Agent
repository_metadata.description: Agent framework and applications built upon Qwen>=3.0, featuring Function Calling, MCP, Code Interpreter, RAG, Chrome extension, etc.

issues.title: qwen-agent支持连接数据库，对表格进行数据分析么？
issues.title_en: Does qwen-agent support connecting to databases for tabular data analysis?
issues.author: cheng18175030250
issues.body: Feature request for database connectivity and SQL-based data analysis capabilities within Qwen-Agent

issues.title: 开源的qwen模型是否支持function call
issues.title_en: Does the open-source Qwen model support function calling?
issues.author: robin-xl
issues.body: Inquiry about function calling protocol support for open-source and self-hosted Qwen models

analysis_metadata.analyst_notes: This analysis showcases the QwenLM community's dedication to continuous improvement. Both closed Work in Progress issues represent features that journeyed from community inquiry to completion — function calling support and database connectivity — core pillars of the modern autonomous agent ecosystem.
